🦆 Create Sample Database

Generate a DuckDB database file with sample business data

📋 Instructions

  1. Click "Generate SQL" below to create sample data
  2. Download the generated SQL file
  3. Use DuckDB CLI to create database: duckdb sample-data.duckdb < sample-data.sql
  4. Or run: bun run generate-sql from the project root
